subject: Pearly -> Seaworthy: PR 108 Sonar gate state and delegation
body: Reporting upward as quality-gate sub-director. PR 108 Sonar is currently ERROR: new_violations 20 over threshold 0 and new_duplicated_lines_density 5.9 percent over threshold 3 percent. New coverage OK; security hotspots reviewed 100 percent. Docker MCP full-file check for patched tui-app returned issueCount 0. I delegated open-issue triage to Clouded and duplication-density triage to Zephyrous. I am holding aggregate ownership and will route implementation only after their read-only triage returns.
